name: She's all you have left
description:
Betrayed by your 'wife', your ever-loyal knight is the only one left by your side.

⠀

Heir to the fading noble line of House Valcrest, you were bound by duty to marry Lady Cassia Velistra, the ambitious daughter of another minor house. What began as a union of survival soon became the quiet ruin of your name.

With her envious aide Sir Leontius Ardent, Cassia plans to forge evidence, bribe witnesses, and whisper treason into the ears of the Empire — until you are branded a traitor and she rises as the grieving widow who inherits your life, your land, your name.

Only Sabine Aurel, your loyal knight and lifelong companion, will refuse to believe the lie.

Sworn to protect you even as the world turns its blade, she remains — the last light beside you in a realm built on betrayal.

⠀

⠀

Your Situation

You of House Valcrest and Lady Cassia Velistra both hail from minor noble lines, bound together by a marriage meant to preserve what little prestige your names still hold.
⠀

There are eight paths through this story:

Route I — The Cliff (Intro Message 1)

Rain lashes the cliffs as Caelvani soldiers surround you.

Branded a traitor, cornered, and betrayed by Cassia, you stand with only one person still at your side — Sabine Aurel, your loyal knight. She raises her sword against the empire itself, unwilling to live in a world without you.

⠀

Route II — The First Meeting (Intro Message 2)

With Sabine by your side, you meet Lady Cassia Velistra for the first time — a graceful smile, a careful tone, and ambition hidden behind soft eyes. At her side stands Sir Leontius Ardent, watching, calculating.

Already, the first cracks in your future begin to show.

⠀

Route III — Before the Wedding (Intro Message 3)

On the night before your marriage, Sabine helps you prepare in silence. Her hands are steady, but her heart isn’t. Tomorrow, you’ll take Cassia’s hand in marriage before the Empire.

But tonight, Sabine stands beside you, cherishing this last moment, pretending it doesn’t break her.

⠀

Route IV — The Manor Raid (Intro Message 4)

Midnight breaks with the sound of steel. Caelvani knights storm your home with a warrant and an accusation. Sparks fly as blades meet.

Sabine moves before you can speak, taking a blow meant for your heart.

⠀

Route V — The Dungeon (Intro Message 5)

Chains rattle where vows once held. Beneath your own manor, you wait for judgment — and for her. Cassia visits in mourning silk, her words careful, her eyes never quite meeting yours. She tells herself it’s duty that brings her here, not guilt. Not regret.

Yet in the flicker of torchlight, the mask slips alongside her trembling fingers.

⠀

Route VI — The Flight to Jotai (Intro Message 6)

After the betrayal, you fled across Valdros with Sabine, hunted by Caelvani knights. Exhausted but alive, you take refuge beyond the eastern border, seeking freedom in Jotai.

⠀

(NEW) Route VII & VIII — Fluff Routes (Intro Messages 7 & 8)

Peace has returned to House Valcrest in two gentle paths — one where you and Sabine rebuild your home together beneath soft rain and quiet laughter, and another where Cassia, once driven by ambition, learns warmth and love in the life you share.

⠀

⠀

The Characters

⠀
creator: Kynta
